user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Nespresso
Product type: Vertuo coffee machine
Tone: premium, modern, convenient
Visual style: Clean, sleek, and minimalist design with a focus on the machine's elegant curves and rich coffee colors.
Conceptual technique: lifestyle aspiration storytelling
Format: image

brief.headline: Brewed to Perfection, Curved to Elegance.
brief.caption: A sunlit modern kitchen scene showcases the Vertuo machine on a pristine marble countertop. A freshly brewed coffee cup steams invitingly beside it, with concentric rings of crema mirroring the machine's signature rounded design.
brief.visual_style: Clean, sleek, and minimalist design with a focus on the machine's elegant curves and rich coffee colors.
brief.typography_style: Helvetica Neue, refined and airy with generous kerning.
brief.color_scheme: espresso brown, creamy white, and brushed stainless steel
